# signoz_user_role (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "signoz_user_role" "engineer_reader" {
  user_id = signoz_user.engineer.id
  role_id = signoz_role.serviceaccount_reader.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `role_id` (String)
- `user_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# User roles are imported using their ID.
terraform import signoz_user_role.engineer_reader 0192a9c2-1234-7abc-8def-0123456789ab
```
